overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark forest at night in a video game, holding a torch that illuminates the dirt path and surrounding vegetation. The scene depicts a continuous trek along a narrow trail with grass verges and trees, creating an atmospheric survival-horror ambiance.

events.description: torch flame enters view from left side, illuminating the path with warm orange light

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path, torch swinging slightly with each step

entered.detail: narrow winding trail composed of packed earth and scattered stones
tall wild grass lining the left side of the trail
tall wild grass lining the right side of the trail
dense dark silhouettes of trees forming the forest canopy
handheld wooden torch with flickering orange flame providing illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night, with the camera moving forward along a dirt path flanked by tall grass. Around the 6-second mark, a torch enters the frame from the left, casting warm flickering light on the path ahead. The surroundings remain consistently dark with only the torch revealing the immediate ground and vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with dense undergrowth and prominent bushes

events.description: large leafy bush with light-colored foliage becomes visible on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding forest path, passing denser vegetation on the left

entered.detail: prominent bush with broad light-colored leaves distinct from the surrounding grass

segments.scene_description: The path continues through the forest with the torch illuminating the way. A large distinctive bush with lighter foliage appears on the left around 25 seconds, replacing the simpler grass verge. The camera passes this bush as it moves deeper into the woods, with the vegetation becoming denser overall.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep forest trail with close tree trunks

agents.ego_description: proceeding deeper into the forest where tree trunks stand closer to the path edges

entered.detail: thick dark tree trunk visible immediately beside the left side of the path
cluster of thick tree trunks visible on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the path entering a denser section of forest where individual tree trunks become visible on both sides. The large bush and grass verges from earlier segments pass out of view, replaced by thicker woodland. The torch continues to provide the only illumination as the camera moves steadily forward through the increasingly enclosed space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark forest that evolves from an open trail into a dense, enclosed woodland. It begins with a forward movement along a dirt path flanked by tall grass in near-total darkness, until a torch enters the frame from the left to cast a warm, flickering glow on the ground. As the camera pushes deeper into the woods, the simple grass verges give way to a large, distinctive bush with lighter foliage on the left. The scene then shifts as the path enters a thicker section of the forest, where the open vegetation is replaced by visible tree trunks crowding both sides of the trail. Finally, the torch remains the sole source of light as the camera moves steadily forward into the increasingly claustrophobic space of the deep woods.
